finding_results.notes: Removed the reassurance cluster after medical timeout, retained only one explicit validating line, and replaced comfort loops with concrete fallout (lost shift, late-fee deferral, unresolved diagnostic delay and new payment burden).

Compressed the aftermath into two movements: immediate institutional/public consequence at the club, then one private domestic turn. Kept one sponsor-status conversation and one imaging-logistics conversation. Final paragraph adds a new unresolved complication (inconclusive x-ray plus delayed MRI authorization).
Utility arrears now align with continuity canon ($1,240.12 remaining after the August payment), removing the conflicting $1,860 figure from chapter math.

summary: Revised Chapter 17 to preserve the retirement decision's discomfort and causality, reduce repetitive aftermath loops, enforce continuity-correct financial arithmetic, and end on a newly introduced unresolved diagnostic/financial complication without sanitizing consequences.
